engine_metering: MAF-based (speed-density model is trained on the Etios — see caveat)
recording_character: ~11.5 min (695 s) at ~6 Hz round-robin; mostly parked idle (~900 rpm, speed 0) with occasional revs to ~2300 rpm. MAP pinned ~104 kPa (barometric) => MAF engine, so MAP carries no idle-vacuum signal.
sparse_pids: Absolute pedal position D/E (4 raw readings each) and Commanded throttle actuator (10) are nearly empty; throttle-to-pedal features are weak.

cross_vehicle_result.naive_etios_baseline: 100% windows -> air_system (conf ~0.52), anomaly saturated 1.0 on 64/64 — a baseline mismatch, NOT a real fault.
cross_vehicle_result.rebaselined_on_this_car: models/ahmed_normalizer.pkl (first 5 min) -> 67% healthy, anomaly mean 0.60, 9/64 saturated.

note: Real recording from a different vehicle than training. Demonstrates the per-vehicle baseline-capture path; it is not a labelled fault recording.
